calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George Sullivan for (petitioner) Matthew Kruger.

Mr. Sullivan reported that they have resolved the objections, that there is no appearance by Mr. Simon and provided the Court with current orders. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Simon for (objector) Michael Castellino.

This matter had been pre-granted.
The Court noted that attorney for Matthew Kruger is not present and continued the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed to October 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)
